name: battle-for-the-american-mind
description: Pete Hegseth and David Goodwin's Battle for the American Mind — understand the principles of classical Christian education (paideia) and the Four Towers of Reason, Virtue, Wonder, and Beauty to evaluate schools and reclaim your child's formation
useCase: Helps parents, educators, and citizens understand the difference between progressive and classical education, evaluate schools using the Four Towers framework, apply the Trivium at home, and cultivate a paideia-rich family culture.
knownRisks: The book presents a specific (classical Christian) viewpoint on education — users should engage with it critically and supplement with other perspectives
Practical implementation of classical education at home requires time, resources, and commitment
